info.title: Public API
info.description: API for managing your non-profit's data with Instil.

parameters.name: custom_field_ids
parameters.description: Filter by a list of Custom Field Definition IDs

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by Custom Field Definition name

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by Custom Field Definition type

post.description: Create a new Event Ticket Definition

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by tag name

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Filter by campaign ID (UUID). Use 'campaign_id=uuid' for exact match, or use operators: campaign_id[equals], campaign_id[any], campaign_id[none_of], campaign_id[is_null]

parameters.name: campaign_id[any]
parameters.description: Filter by any of the provided campaign IDs (comma-separated UUIDs)

parameters.name: campaign_id[equals]
parameters.description: Filter by exact campaign ID match (UUID)

parameters.name: campaign_id[is_null]
parameters.description: Filter by whether campaign_id is null (true/false)

parameters.name: campaign_id[none_of]
parameters.description: Exclude events with these campaign IDs (comma-separated UUIDs)

parameters.name: campaign_id[not_equals]
parameters.description: Exclude events with this campaign ID (UUID)

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Filter by event ID (UUID). Use 'ids=uuid' for exact match, or use operators: ids[equals], ids[any], ids[none_of], ids[is_null]

parameters.name: ids[any]
parameters.description: Filter by any of the provided event IDs (comma-separated UUIDs)

parameters.name: ids[equals]
parameters.description: Filter by exact event ID match (UUID)

parameters.name: ids[is_null]
parameters.description: Filter by whether id is null (true/false)

parameters.name: ids[none_of]
parameters.description: Exclude events with these IDs (comma-separated UUIDs)

parameters.name: ids[not_equals]
parameters.description: Exclude events with this ID (UUID)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by event name. Use 'name=text' for exact match (case-insensitive), or use operators: name[equals], name[contains], name[not_contains], name[any], name[none_of]

parameters.name: name[any]
parameters.description: Filter by any of the provided event names (comma-separated, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: name[contains]
parameters.description: Filter by event name containing the text (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: name[equals]
parameters.description: Filter by exact event name match (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: name[is_null]
parameters.description: Filter by whether name is null (true/false)

parameters.name: name[none_of]
parameters.description: Exclude events with these names (comma-separated, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: name[not_contains]
parameters.description: Exclude events with names containing the text (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: name[not_equals]
parameters.description: Exclude events with this exact name (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: page[cursor]
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the cursor from the 'links' section of the previous response to get the next page.

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: Number of events to return per page (default: 25)

parameters.name: registration_type
parameters.description: Filter by registration type. Use 'registration_type=type' for exact match (case-insensitive), or use operators: registration_type[equals], registration_type[contains], registration_type[any], registration_type[none_of]

parameters.name: registration_type[any]
parameters.description: Filter by any of the provided registration types (comma-separated, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: registration_type[contains]
parameters.description: Filter by registration type containing the text (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: registration_type[equals]
parameters.description: Filter by exact registration type match (case-insensitive). Valid values: 'open', 'ticketed'

parameters.name: registration_type[is_null]
parameters.description: Filter by whether registration_type is null (true/false)

parameters.name: registration_type[none_of]
parameters.description: Exclude events with these registration types (comma-separated, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: registration_type[not_equals]
parameters.description: Exclude events with this exact registration type (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: subscriber_id
parameters.description: Filter by subscriber ID (UUID). Use 'subscriber_id=uuid' for exact match, or use operators: subscriber_id[equals], subscriber_id[any], subscriber_id[none_of], subscriber_id[is_null]

parameters.name: subscriber_id[any]
parameters.description: Filter by any of the provided subscriber IDs (comma-separated UUIDs)

parameters.name: subscriber_id[equals]
parameters.description: Filter by exact subscriber ID match (UUID)

parameters.name: subscriber_id[is_null]
parameters.description: Filter by whether subscriber_id is null (true/false)

parameters.name: subscriber_id[none_of]
parameters.description: Exclude events with these subscriber IDs (comma-separated UUIDs)

parameters.name: subscriber_id[not_equals]
parameters.description: Exclude events with this subscriber ID (UUID)

CadenceEnum.description:
* `daily` - daily
* `weekly` - weekly
* `biweekly` - biweekly
* `monthly` - monthly
* `quarterly` - quarterly
* `biannually` - biannually
* `annually` - annually

* `text` - text
* `textarea` - textarea
* `select` - select
* `multiselect` - multiselect
* `date` - date
* `checkbox` - checkbox

default.detail: You do not have permission to perform this action.

default.detail: Failed to locate resource of type <RESOURCE> with ID <RESOURCE_UUID>

TransactionPaymentMethodTypeEnum.description:

* `cash` - cash
* `card` - card
* `wire` - wire
* `app` - app
* `crypto` - crypto
* `unknown` - unknown

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: A campaign represents a fundraising effort.

tags.name: Constituents
tags.description: A constituent represents a person or organization that makes contributions to the non-profit.

tags.name: Contributions
tags.description: A contribution represents a monetary or non-monetary donation to the non-profit. Examples include monetary transactions, time contributions via volunteering and in-kind donations.

tags.name: Event Ticket Definitions (DEPRECATED)
tags.description: An Event Ticket Definition represents the defining attributes of an Event Ticket. It is used to create Event Tickets for an Event. An example of an Event Ticket Definition is a VIP ticket that costs $10,000, of which only 20 are available.

tags.name: Events (DEPRECATED)
tags.description: An Event represents a gathering or happening that is organized by the non-profit. Examples include galas, walk-a-thons, concerts, etc.

tags.name: Recurring Schedules
tags.description: A Recurring Schedule represents a schedule that repeats at regular intervals. Examples include a monthly donation, a weekly volunteer shift, etc.

tags.name: Saved Filters
tags.description: A Saved Filter represents a set of criteria that can be saved and applied to filter constituents. Examples include a filter for all constituents who have donated more than $1,000 in the last year, a filter for all constituents who have volunteered in the last month, etc.

tags.name: Tickets (DEPRECATED)
tags.description: A Ticket, or Event Ticket, associates a Constituent with an Event. A Constituent can purchase a Ticket or be given a Ticket. Examples include Jane owning 5 Backstage Passes, Joe owning 1 General Admission Ticket, etc.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: A Transaction represents a monetary donation made to the non-profit. Examples include a donation made via a credit card, a donation made via a payment application, etc.
